DISsyntax.title: DIS Syntax Laser PDU
DISsyntax.description: Laser PDU and associated records. Conforms to 1278.1-202X Draft 5 and SISO-REF-030 Version 1.0.

FixedRecordField.name: Beam Spot Offset with Respect to Illuminated Object
